description: Model a utility-scale solar site layout in SketchUp Make 2017 using Skelion. Ensure model units are in Meters. 1) Draw a 30m x 30m square perimeter fence/wall (approx 2m high) on the ground plane centered near the origin. 2) Inside the fence, install exactly 3 parallel rows of solar panels. Rows must run North-South (parallel to the Green axis), be about 20m long, and be spaced approximately 6 meters apart (pitch). 3) Simulate a morning tracker position: the panels must be tilted 45 degrees and face East (towards the positive Red axis), NOT South. 4) Save the model to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tracker_site.skp.
